<thought>
I am at cell row 02 column B facing right (`>`). The cell in front (row 02 column C) has lava (`L`), which is deadly and must be avoided. To reach the goal at row 04 column D, I need to move downwards eventually. I will rotate clockwise to face down (`v`) so I can move safely down the column B.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at cell row 02 column B facing down (`v`). The cell in front (row 03 column B) is empty (`.`), so it is safe to move forward. Moving forward will bring me closer to the goal at row 04 column D.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at cell row 03 column B facing down (`v`). The cell in front (row 04 column B) is empty (`.`), so it is safe to move forward. This move takes me closer to the goal at row 04 column D.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at cell row 04 column B facing down (`v`). The cell in front (row 05 column B) is a wall (`#`), so I cannot move forward. To reach the goal at row 04 column D, I need to turn right (facing right `>`). To change orientation from down to right, I will turn clockwise.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at cell row 04 column B facing left (`<`). The goal is at row 04 column D, which is two cells to the right. I need to face right (`>`) to move towards the goal. I will turn 180 degrees by turning clockwise twice.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at cell row 04 column B facing up (`^`). To reach the goal at row 04 column D, I need to face right (`>`). From up, turning clockwise once will face me right.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at cell row 04 column B facing right (`>`). The cell ahead (row 04 column C) is floor (`.`), so it is safe to move forward towards the goal.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at cell row 04 column C facing right (`>`). The cell ahead (row 04 column D) contains the goal (`O`). Moving forward will take me to the goal.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>
